name: Malfunctioning Auto Closet (Transform-O series)
description:
Hi and hello!

"Warning, to all customers of Transform-O Corps products. Our latest in transformation wares, the Auto Closet 800, has been recalled due to a programing error. The Auto Closet 900 will be out on the market soon, as soon as we fix the issue of the machine force changing guys into cute girls. Thank you."
creator: RutaRune
